citations.claim: The app is a menu-bar-only macOS application that wraps the Rust darkbloom binary with dynamic activation policy management
The app structure includes MenuBarExtra, Settings, Dashboard, Setup, and Log windows with proper scene management
StatusViewModel centralizes all provider state and coordinates between managers and UI components
The view model manages published properties for provider state, hardware info, wallet data, and connectivity
ProviderManager manages the darkbloom binary as a subprocess with output capture and auto-restart capabilities
The manager implements exponential backoff crash recovery with up to 5 restart attempts
CLIRunner centralizes all darkbloom subcommand execution with proper process management
Binary resolution follows a consistent search order: ~/.darkbloom/bin, app bundle, then PATH
MenuBarView provides the main dropdown interface with Liquid Glass effects on macOS 26+
SecurityManager performs comprehensive security posture assessment for hardware trust verification
Hardware trust requires Secure Enclave, MDM enrollment, SIP, and Secure Boot all enabled
ModelManager scans HuggingFace cache directory for MLX models and manages downloads
ConfigManager reads and writes the same provider.toml used by the Rust CLI for consistency
TelemetryReporter ships errors and crash reports to coordinator with bounded buffering and debounced flushing
The component has zero external Swift package dependencies, only targeting macOS 14+
Real-time status polling checks both process existence and backend health on port 8100
Provider output parsing extracts connection status, inference lifecycle, and throughput metrics from tracing logs
AppDelegate manages activation policy switching between accessory and regular modes based on window visibility
Design system provides unified color tokens matching console.darkbloom.dev with light/dark mode support
